title: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by Kamon-san » Tue Jan 29, 2019 9:45 am Hey there! I was watching James Rolfe's review of Akira this morning and was surprised to hear his buddies talk about Eva for a bit. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=39_R12P ... dex=3&t=0s The show is mentioned from about 9:53 to 10:54. I always find it amusing when content creators I've been following for a long time suddenly mention a series or franchise I'm fond of. I figured I would share it with you guys (especially since some of you might be fans of James). Now I'm just wondering if James will tackle Eva someday and perhaps even give it a review!

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 29, 2019 10:04 am I was expecting Justin to be the one to bring it up. I remember him and Jarrett doing some Eva references and parodies on their defunct Silvermania channel. It would be interesting if James reviewed Eva, although I feel like he wouldn't be able to spend enough time with it to really get it. I have the feeling a number of people will unexpectedly get into it now that it'll be on Netflix.

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Tue Jan 29, 2019 1:43 pm I have a bad feeling it will be like benthesages review for some reason

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jan 31, 2019 7:09 pm Ambiant23 wrote: I have a bad feeling it will be like benthesages review for some reason :facepalm:

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Thu Jan 31, 2019 8:01 pm Yeah you're probably right I have noticed that his reviews outside of AVGN are a lot more intellectual

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Feb 01, 2019 6:31 am Ambiant23 wrote: Yeah you're probably right I have noticed that his reviews outside of AVGN are a lot more intellectual

[]: Re: Evangelion mentioned on Cinemassacre             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Fri Feb 01, 2019 10:45 am I knew its just a character.
